## 🚀 Installation

Linux:
```bash
curl -fsSL https://github.com/ageos-labs/ageos-runtime/releases/latest/download/install.sh | bash
```

Windows:
```powershell
irm https://github.com/ageos-labs/ageos-runtime/releases/latest/download/install.ps1 | iex
```
